subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto Him Who hath revealed the verses, made manifest the clear proofs, and Who speaketh from the trees: "Verily, I am the Almighty, the All-Powerful." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لمنزل الایات و مظهر البینات و الناطق فی الاشجار بانا المقتدر المختار
subcodes.subjects: @prayers (general or uncategorized), @prayer for protection, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @praise and encouragement
